ogTitle: Couridjah vs Coutts Crossing: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Couridjah and Coutts Crossing.
heading: Couridjah vs Coutts Crossing — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Couridjah, New South Wales and Coutts Crossing, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coutts Crossing has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Couridjah (52/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Couridjah or Coutts Crossing safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Couridjah has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Coutts Crossing scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Couridjah scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Coutts Crossing scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Couridjah or Coutts Crossing?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coutts Crossing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
